content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File - Government Code Section 81005

Date: January 23, 1978

From: Barbara Campbell  
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION

Subject:

At the January 23, 1978, Opinion Request meeting, the staff concluded that major donor committees who contribute only to multi-purpose committees should file their campaign statements in the following places: Secretary of State, Los Angeles, San Francisco and County of Domicile.

cc: Ted Prim
